findings.message: README Usage shows /trading-ideas AAPL (direct-file install name) but plugin.json description explicitly says 'via /trading-ideas:research command' — two install paths yield different command names with no explanation
No CLAUDE.md in plugin root (commands/trading-ideas/); R49 requires it for Claude Code integration context
plugin.json declares no commands array; auto-discovery from the commands/ directory may work but explicit declaration is safer
No empty input handling: bare invocation with no ticker leaves behavior undefined
--detailed flag declared in argument-hint has no corresponding conditional behavior; README implies enhanced output for the flag

No CLAUDE.md in plugin root (commands/trading-ideas/); R49 requires it for Claude Code integration context — Glob of target-repo/commands/trading-ideas/ returns no CLAUDE.md file; plugin root confirmed absent

README Usage shows /trading-ideas AAPL (direct-file install name) but plugin.json description explicitly says 'via /trading-ideas:research command' — two install paths yield different command names with no explanation
No empty input handling: bare invocation with no ticker leaves behavior undefined — Command body opens with 'When given a stock ticker' with no prior branch for empty $ARGUMENTS

--detailed flag declared in argument-hint has no corresponding conditional behavior; README implies enhanced output for the flag — argument-hint declares [--detailed] but no conditional branch for this flag exists anywhere in the command body
plugin.json declares no commands array; auto-discovery from the commands/ directory may work but explicit declaration is safer
